time_text: {{ ((exif.DateTimeOriginal or exif.CreateDate or exif.DigitalCreationDateTime or exif.DigitalCreationDate or exif.DateCreated or exif.DateTimeCreated or '-') | replace(':', '.', 2)) }}
focal_text: {{ (((exif.FocalLengthIn35mmFormat or exif.FocalLength)|default('', true)) | replace(' mm', '') | replace('mm', '') | replace('.0', '')) ~ ('mm' if (exif.FocalLengthIn35mmFormat or exif.FocalLength) else '-') }}
shutter_text: {{ ((exif.ShutterSpeed or exif.ShutterSpeedValue) ~ ('s' if (exif.ShutterSpeed or exif.ShutterSpeedValue) and not (exif.ShutterSpeed or exif.ShutterSpeedValue).endswith('s') else '')) if (exif.ShutterSpeed or exif.ShutterSpeedValue) else '-' }}
aperture_text: {{ ('f/' ~ (((exif.ApertureValue or exif.AperatureValue or exif.FNumber)|default('', true)) | replace('.0', ''))) if (exif.ApertureValue or exif.AperatureValue or exif.FNumber) else '-' }}
